name: Deoxys Delta Defense Forme - Holon Phantoms

abilities.name: Form Change
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for another Deoxys and switch it with Deoxys.

attacks.name: Delta Reduction
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Deoxys by attacks is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

tests.name: delta_reduction_reduces_damage
tests.description: Test Delta Reduction reduces incoming damage by 30
